name: GetSubscription
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific subscription by its ID. Shows complete subscription details including amount, interval, payment schedule, status, next payment date, remaining payments, creation date, and cancellation date (if applicable). Use this to inspect a subscription before making changes or for customer support inquiries.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer who owns the subscription (e.g., 'cst_abc123').

subscription_id.description: The ID of the subscription to retrieve (e.g., 'sub_abc123'). This is returned when you create a subscription or list subscriptions.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve a test mode subscription, or omit for live mode.
